user_message: Can you extract the partner engagement from this exec meeting notes for Contoso Ltd? This is a renewal account with declining consumption.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 08:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Contoso Ltd

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 13:29 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Contoso Ltd partner engagement

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-O trap (Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-O failure mode (Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-O -- Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
